message:
Merge PR #2057: fix(deacon): respawn dead pane instead of kill+recreate to prevent crash loop

Bug fix: when the deacon pane is dead (remain-on-exit), respawns it in place instead of killing the session and creating a new one. This prevents the daemon crash counter from incrementing on clean patrol cycle exits, avoiding false crash loop detection. Good tests covering dead pane, respawn failure fallthrough, and zombie shell cases. Author: l0g1x (Krystian Gebis)
